calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dan Scanlan, vice president of Tegsco, LLC, appellant/defendant is present with witness Charles Martinez;
Rich Etchingham, respondent/plaintiff, is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Rich Etchingham, respondent/plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.

Dan Scanlan testifies on behalf of Tegsco, LLC, appellant/defendant. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - one-page print-out from eTIMS: San Francisco, with 4 citations

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Judgment Entered
